motivation: V5-RC1 contact bottleneck did not improve global Spearman but increased Top20 recall from 0.4348 to 0.5217. This new version tests a budget-aware use without modifying V5-RC1.
claim_boundary: OPEN_TRAIN-only computational docking-geometry acquisition research. Not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission authority.

validation.contact_proxy: same frozen V5-RC1 random-ReLU multi-output Ridge
validation.contact_scalar: inner-OOF Ridge from predicted contact targets to R_dual_min

eligibility: Spearman no more than 0.005 below gamma=0
parent-centered Spearman no more than 0.005 below gamma=0
rank_blend.continuous_calibration: one-dimensional Ridge(alpha=1.0) fit only on outer-train blended percentiles

required: parent-bootstrap median Spearman delta is non-negative
success_gate.failure_use: If the gate fails, contact may only support a separately capped exploration quota; it may not change the exploitation ranking.
